# title

**Interface Property**

The text to display in the annotation’s callout.

## Declaration

```swift
title?: string;
```

## Discussion

The title to show in the callout. The default value is `""` (empty string).

## Creating data and titles

- **data**: Data that you define and assign to the annotation.
- **subtitle**: The text to display as a subtitle on the second line of an annotation’s callout.
- **accessibilityLabel**: Accessibility text for the annotation.
